title: EPA set to revoke 'endangerment finding' that underpins all climate regulation
summary: The endangerment finding gives the EPA authority to regulate greenhouse gases by deeming they pose a risk to public health and welfare.

title: CVS tops quarterly estimates, reaffirms profit outlook as turnaround plan takes effect
summary: The results signal steady progress in the health-care giant's aggressive turnaround plan under CEO David Joyner, who stepped into the role in late 2024.
